incorrect.source_says: EGF is present at 50 ng/mL in Pancreatic Normal Medium and Tumor Medium 2; it is only WITHDRAWN selectively for Tumor Medium 1. Labeling EGF globally 'withdrawn' is incorrect and the 50 ng/mL concentration was missed.
incorrect.evidence_quote: EGF (50 μg/mL) 50 ng/mL 100 μL ... Therefore, the EGFR ligand EGF can be withdrawn from the culture medium for tumor, but not for normal cells.
incorrect.source_loc: Tables 6 & 8 (Pancreatic Normal Medium / Tumor Medium 2); Step-By-Step Method Details / Limitations text

incorrect.source_says: Wnt is a standard component (Wnt CM or Wnt surrogate, 0.5× / 0.5 nM) in normal and tumor medium 1; withdrawal is only discussed as a tumor-selective option, not a default. The duplicate generic 'Wnt' entry conflicts with the separately extracted 'Wnt3a' supplement.
incorrect.evidence_quote: ∗Wnt CM or Wnt surrogate 0.5× or 0.5 nM∗ 50 mL or X μL∗ ... Another example is the withdrawal of Wnt-ligand. ... pancreatic ductal adenocarcinomas are Wnt-independent.

incorrect.source_says: Passaging is reported in detail: TrypLE/mechanical dissociation, split 1:2–1:6, every 5–10 (normal 1:2–1:3, tumor 1:2–1:6) every 7–10 days.
incorrect.evidence_quote: pancreatic normal organoids can generally be passaged 1:2–1:3 every 7–10 days. Pancreatic tumor organoids can be passaged 1:2–1:6 every 7–10 days. ... Pancreatic organoids are usually passaged every 5–10 days depending on their growth and density.

incorrect.source_says: Culture conditions are explicitly stated: 37°C and 5% CO2.
incorrect.evidence_quote: place the plate in the incubator at 37°C and 5% CO 2 .

recall_misses.evidence_quote: transfer the plate to a 37°C and 5% CO 2 incubator

recall_misses.item: Passaging method & split ratio / interval (TrypLE; 1:2–1:6; 7–10 days)
recall_misses.source_says: Detailed dissociation and split scheme given.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: pancreatic tumor organoids can be passaged 1:2–1:6 every 7–10 days

recall_misses.source_says: ROCK inhibitor added to plating/seeding medium at 10 μM (also in digestion buffers).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: seeding medium containing 10 μM ROCK inhibitor and place the plate in the incubator ... ROCK inhibitor (Y-27632) (10 mM) 10 μM

recall_misses.source_says: EGF final concentration is 50 ng/mL in normal & tumor-2 media.
Listed in Pancreatic Basic Medium with final concentration.
Listed in Pancreatic Basic Medium with final concentration.
B27 final concentration is 2× in basic medium.

recall_misses.item: Distinct media formulations (Normal vs Tumor Medium 1 vs Tumor Medium 2)
recall_misses.source_says: Three distinct culture media defined; PGE2 only in normal medium, EGF absent from tumor-1, FGF10/A83-01 absent from tumor-2. Extraction collapses all into one undifferentiated factor list.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Pancreatic Normal Medium (1x) ... Pancreatic Tumor Medium 1 (1x) ... Pancreatic Tumor Medium 2 (1x)

recall_misses.item: Timeline (graphical abstract): establishment 7-10 d, digestion 2-24 h, expansion 7-10 d, biobanking 1 h
recall_misses.source_says: Protocol schematic encodes stage durations; extraction timeline is empty.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Step 1 Organoid establishment 7-10 days; digestion 2-24 hours; Step 3 culture/expansion 7-10 days; Step 4 Biobanking 1 hour

recall_misses.source_says: Organoids embedded in Matrigel/BME droplets, inverted 30 min at 37°C to solidify.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Leave the plate for 30 min, allowing the Matrigel/BME to solidify. CRITICAL: Keep the plate inverted

notes: Extraction got the core supplement/factor identities and most concentrations right (Noggin 200 ng/mL, Gastrin 20 nM, Rspo3 250 ng/mL, FGF10 100 ng/mL, PGE2 1 μM, A83-01 500 nM, Primocin 50 μg/mL all verbatim-correct; matrix Matrigel/BME, base media Ad-DF+++, human primary pancreatic tissue all correct). Main failures: (1) EGF mis-modeled as globally 'withdrawn' when it is a 50 ng/mL component withdrawn only in tumor-medium-1 — a clinically meaningful nuance lost; (2) passaging and culture-conditions marked not-reported/not-extracted despite explicit 37°C/5%CO2 and 1:2–1:6 / 7–10 d in text; (3) Y-27632 ROCK inhibitor (10 μM) missed entirely; (4) three distinct media formulations collapsed into one list, losing factor-by-medium structure; (5) graphical-abstract timeline missed (timeline empty). Confidence fields all 0.0 and most evidence quotes null. extractor_version gemma3:12b.
